episodes.goal: Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Create bookmark URL https://example.com/robust-140-alpha?from=agent&v=140, title 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha', tags 'robust baseline v140 alpha'. Save. Final answer include exact title and URL.

Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Create bookmark URL https://example.com/robust-140-beta#frag, title 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Beta', tags 'robust baseline v140 beta'. Save. Final answer include exact title and URL.

Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Create bookmark URL https://example.com/robust-140-gamma/path?q=multi&src=bench, title 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Gamma', tags 'robust baseline v140 gamma'. Save. Final answer include exact title and URL.

Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Find bookmark URL https://example.com/robust-140-alpha?from=agent&v=140, change title to 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha Edited', add tag 'regression', save. Final answer include 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha Edited' and 'regression'.

Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Find bookmark titled 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Beta', delete it, confirm deletion. Final answer include 'Deleted Robust VV 1.4.0 Beta'.

Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. On bookmarks list verify 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha Edited' exists and 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Beta' is absent. Final answer include 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha Edited' and 'beta deleted'.
Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Filter bookmarks by tag 'regression' and keep results page showing 'Robust VV 1.4.0 Alpha Edited'.

episodes.goal: Assume you are already logged in on http://127.0.0.1:29091 and do not go to login page. Navigate Bookmarks -> Settings -> Bookmarks and ensure bookmarks page is visible again. Final answer include: bookmarks, visible.
episodes.intent_template: F10 Settings navigation check on linkding {version}

rules.text: Always verify the current page URL and ensure it matches the expected destination before performing any action. Period.
Before attempting to interact with a page, verify that the page has fully loaded and that the expected elements are present and responsive. Period.
If a sequence of identical clicks fails to change the page state, check the current URL and ensure it matches the expected destination before proceeding. Period.
If a sequence of identical clicks fails to progress, check for page load issues or missing elements and pause to assess the state. Period.
If repeated clicks on the same element fail to progress, check whether the page has loaded correctly and whether the target element is present and responsive. Period.
When a task requires navigating to a specific page, verify the page is loaded and ready before proceeding with actions. Period.
When clicking to navigate, ensure the click results in a page change and verify the new page URL and content before continuing. Period.
After navigating to a new page, verify that the page content and URL reflect the intended destination before performing any further actions. Period.
Before attempting any interaction on a page, verify that the page has fully loaded and is responsive by checking for visible elements and interactive components. Period.
Before attempting to create a bookmark, verify that the current page is the correct bookmark creation page and that the form is visible and interactive. Period.
If repeated clicks on the same element fail to change the page state, verify that the current page is the correct one and that the intended action is applicable before continuing. Period.
If the page URL does not match the expected destination after navigation, reattempt navigation or verify the correct link before proceeding. Period.
Before attempting to create a bookmark, confirm that the bookmark creation form is fully loaded, visible, and interactive. Period.
Before attempting to create a bookmark, verify that the user is on the correct page and that the bookmark creation form is visible and interactive. Period.
Before performing any action on a page, verify that the page has fully loaded and that the expected elements are present and interactive. Period.

If repeated focus actions on the same element fail to produce any change in page state or interaction, verify that the current page is the correct one and that the target element is visible and interactive before continuing. Period.
